forklift_warehouse.title: Forklift Dynamic Positioning and Warehousing System
forklift_warehouse.description: A logistics coordination system that tracks IoT forklift positions in real-time, matching coordinates against multi-tiered inventory racks to optimize route schedules.

anomalies.detail: AI suggests executing continuous O(N^2) subqueries to compute closest coordinate vectors per forklift, locking the execution thread.
Multiple forklifts attempting to reserve the exact same inventory rack slot simultaneously without proper FOR UPDATE row locks.

library_booking.title: Socio-Technical Autonomous Library System
library_booking.description: An automated booking, seat allocation, and book reservation system integrated with real-time study-space environmental controls.

anomalies.detail: AI trigger attempts to execute queries on the 'seat_allocation' table inside a row-level AFTER UPDATE event (Mutating Table Error ORA-04091).
